offer: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, reconciling multiple utility bills causes cash flow gaps. We aggregate and reconcile utility bills instead of manual reconciliation of utility bills.
problem: Reconciling multiple utility bills can lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try monthly variance report generation and manual bill entry option on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
